case_title: FARZANEH FARIBA VS. NORA LIGHTING INC

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR FARIBA, FARZANEH ASSIGNED TO ORANGE CAPITAL SOLUTIONS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARIBA, FARZANEH AS TO DEFENDANT NORA LIGHTING INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2009 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,611.08 ACCRUED INTEREST, $150.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT NORA LIGHTING INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FARIBA, FARZANEH AS TO DEFENDANT NORA LIGHTING INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. CHALLENGE TO VENUE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2008 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-28-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. VENUE CHALLENGE DENIED. HOWEVER, DEFENDANT MAY REQUEST THAT IT APPEAR BY TELEPHONE, AND SUBMIT ANY DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE TO THE COURT PRIOR TO TRIAL. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED IN COURT FILE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NORA LIGHTING INC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARIBA, FARZANEH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORA LIGHTING INC $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,885.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT. NOTICE RE CHALLENGE OF VENUE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
